description: Takes a Cufflinks FPKM_tracking file and converts it to GCT format.
author: GenePattern Team
plan:
## Fpkm_trackingToGct GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
Fpkm_trackingToGct is a GenePattern module that Takes a Cufflinks FPKM_tracking file and converts it to GCT format.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 5 parameters:
- Required: input.file, row.labels, row.descriptions, filter.rows, output.prefix
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<perl> <libdir>Fpkm_trackingToGct.pl -input <input.file> -rownames <row.labels> -rowdescs <row.descriptions> -filterDashRowNames <filter.rows> -output <output.prefix>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: row.labels
parameters.description: Select row labels to be written to GCT file

parameters.name: row.descriptions
parameters.description: Select row descriptions to be written to GCT file

parameters.name: filter.rows
parameters.description: Whether to filter rows with invalid row names (ie., "-")

parameters.name: output.prefix
parameters.description: A label that will be used to name the GCT output file.
